title: Autospeller
description: A mod which adds advanced spell checking and suggestions to chat.
body:
# Autospeller

Autospeller provides text highlighting and corrections to Minecraft's chat.

While the mod is still in it's early development, it already provides grammar, punctuation and spelling corrections.

![Preview of the chat corrections](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a115c236dc56a2319ef258a53e086c624c9ae9b2_0.webp)


## Language & Version Support
Autospeller currently only supports the **Fabric** and **NeoForge** modloaders. Forge support is not planned.

| Version  | Fabric | NeoForge |
|----------|--------|----------|
| **26.2** | ✅      | ✅        |
| **26.1** | ✅      | ✅        |

Autospeller currently only supports **French** and **English** (default).

Support for other languages, such as Spanish and German, might come later.

| Language | Localization | Functionnality |
|----------|--------------|----------------|
| French   | ✅            | ✅              |
| English  | ✅            | ✅              |
